title: Moroccan Chebakia
description: A traditional Moroccan dessert made with honey and spices, served with a crunchy sesame seed topping.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, cinnamon, ginger, and salt.
Add the honey, vegetable oil, and orange blossom water to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into small pieces and shape each piece into a triangle.
Heat the sesame seeds in a pan over medium heat until fragrant and lightly browned.
Dip each triangle into the sesame seeds, coating both sides evenly.
Place the triangles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the sesame seeds are golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
